Home · Riverboats

Canyon boat choreography: translucent hulls & skippered shortcuts

Watching fish flicker beneath a glass keel feels almost meditative—a foil to crashing rapids tackled by specialists linked in our rafting Omis dossier. Taxi hops stitch beach picnics beyond walking distance; bareboat aficionados savour throttle autonomy paired with skipper tips.

Evening palettes & lighting

Golden shafts pierce gorge mist during late sails—coordinate cameras before departure. Mention dietary needs; some crews tuck chilled Pelješac rosé onboard when legal windows allow.

Multi-craft combos: book kayaks concurrently via kayaking guide for split-party adventures.
